description: A2A Plane source-public final approval packet and execution-orchestrator schema. It converts reviewed evidence into a deterministic, dry-run/simulate execution plan only. GO_CANDIDATE means approval-ready; it never performs approval, repository visibility, release, provider-send, deploy/restart, terminal ACK, database mutation, or community-post actions.

gates.title: Final approval packet
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Final approval packet is missing packetId/manifestDigest or does not bind a separate operator-approval gate.
evidence: Packet has stable packetId and manifestDigest.
Packet names the reviewed source-public scope without executing it.
Operator approval, if present, is separate from tests, scanners, Start/PR/Done/Block comments, provider IDs, and Terminal Brief evidence.

gates.title: Deterministic dry-run execution plan
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Execution plan is missing, is not dry-run/simulate, is not bound to the approved packet digest, or its declared digest does not match its canonical content.
evidence: Plan approvalPacketId and approvedManifestDigest exactly match the final approval packet.
Plan mode is simulate/dry-run only and source-public execution remains not performed.
Plan digest is derived from canonical plan content and remains stable across replay.

gates.title: Scanner/history binding
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Scanner/history evidence is absent, stale, not dispositioned, or bound to a different manifest digest.
evidence: Scanner digest, history digest, and manifest digest are redacted and present.
Findings are clean or explicitly dispositioned without publishing secret values.
Binding manifest digest matches the final approval packet manifest digest.

gates.title: Idempotency and replay protection
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Replay proof is missing, uses a different idempotency key, creates duplicate execution plans/live actions/terminal markers, or permits manifest mismatch reuse.
evidence: Idempotency key is stable and shared by the packet, plan, and replay proof.
Replay count is at least two and creates zero duplicate live actions, terminal markers, or divergent plans.
Manifest mismatch decision is NO_GO.

gates.title: Preflight failure semantics
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Preflight semantics are missing or allow side effects before a failing preflight resolves to NO_GO.
evidence: Preflight status is GO for candidate plans; failures resolve to NO_GO.
No side effects occur before preflight completes.
Failure output is Block/NO_GO evidence, not approval execution.

gates.title: Rollback and abort runbook
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Rollback/abort runbook is missing or does not stop before approval/release/visibility/provider/deploy/DB/ACK effects.
evidence: Abort path stops before any side effect.
Rollback path names manual operator steps for a later separately approved execution failure.
No automatic approval, release, merge, visibility change, provider send, deploy/restart, DB mutation, or terminal ACK is included.

gates.title: OpenClaw runtime/bootstrap hygiene
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Runtime/bootstrap context files would enter branch diff, PR text, issue comment, or artifact evidence.
evidence: Branch diff and artifact evidence exclude AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, USER.md, TOOLS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, IDENTITY.md, and .openclaw/**.
Block output reports exact repo-relative offending paths when detected.

gates.title: Redacted evidence policy
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Evidence includes raw secrets, raw session dumps, provider targets, host-private paths, or private source snippets.
evidence: Evidence contains issue/PR URLs, statuses, counts, hashes, and redacted artifact references only.
No credentials, provider identifiers, chat IDs, raw logs, raw session dumps, or host-private paths are pasted.

gates.title: Separate explicit operator approval
gates.blockedWhenMissing: Complete dry-run plan remains NEEDS_OPERATOR_APPROVAL until a separate operator approval names the exact packet/plan scope. Approval evidence is never execution.
evidence: Approval evidence, if present, is separate from scanner/test/provider/Terminal Brief/Start/PR/Done/Block evidence.
This orchestrator never executes that approval.
